tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exits non-zero (1) with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18 U-N/U-O verified)

documentation_gaps.gap: scripts/pending-approval.sh --validate prints [FAIL] schema errors but exits 0; callers cannot detect invalid sentinel via exit code.
Sentinel JSON schema is documented inline only; the keys 'question', 'options', 'recommendation', 'offered_at' are not listed in builders-guide.md or in init.sh output.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/pending-approval.sh (no schema reference; docs/builders-guide.md 'Structured Decision Points')

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: all 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) complete=0

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh exits 0 ('Phase gates consistent.') after phase1 steps complete

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: current_phase remains 0 after gate passes; nothing in framework auto-advances .current_phase. Manually advanced to continue protocol. U-D regression confirmed.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: complete all phase1_architecture steps; bash check-phase-gate.sh; jq .current_phase .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.expected: current_phase advances 0->1 after gate passes (per documented Phase 1->2 flow)
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase stays 0; no --advance command exists; user must manually edit phase-state.json

documentation_gaps.gap: No documented command (e.g. --advance-phase) to update current_phase after gate passes; users left to hand-edit JSON.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/process-checklist.sh (no advance handler); docs/reference/builders-guide.md (Phase Gate procedure)

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: all 6 build_loop steps marked complete in sequence

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit succeeded after all 5 prior steps complete

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded with RC=0 — PreToolUse-bypassing shell commits are NOT blocked. U-C confirmation.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + feature_recorded step, --start-feature uat-feat-2 succeeded and a new feat: commit was permitted. PR #17 grace-window fix verified.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: With valid .claude/pending-approval.json, scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh returned permissionDecision=deny via stdin payload {tool_input.command='git commit -m test'}

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed sentinel; subsequent gate call no longer blocked on pending-approval (it then complained about phase2_init verification, which is a separate guard)

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: uat-feat-2 appears in .features_completed after record-feature + complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: BL-006 git commit-msg hook absent; direct shell commits bypass gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: in project, after recording one feature, run: git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'
framework_bugs.expected: commit blocked because no Build Loop is active for the new feat
framework_bugs.actual: commit succeeds (RC=0); BL-006 only enforced via Claude Code PreToolUse, not via git commit-msg hook

framework_bugs.reproduction: after init+start-phase1, run scripts/process-checklist.sh --verify-init then attempt scripts/process-checklist.sh --complete-step phase2_init:backup_restore_tested
framework_bugs.expected: verify-init lists only valid step names; --complete-step accepts the named steps
framework_bugs.actual: verify-init suggests 'data_model_applied AND backup/restore_tested' but PHASE2_INIT_STEPS does not contain backup_restore_tested; --complete-step phase2_init:backup_restore_tested errors 'Unknown step'

documentation_gaps.gap: verify-init message references 'backup/restore tested' but no such step exists in phase2_init steps array; mismatch between verify-init prompt and complete-step accepted ids.
BL-006 enforcement only via PreToolUse hook is documented but the pure shell-bypass risk (U-C) is not noted in builders-guide.md.

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 RC=0 (warned about UAT count, but exited 0)

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh requires a populated HTML file with `const scenarios = [...]` JS block; on a stub HTML it prints 'No scenarios block found' but still exits 0. Doc gap, not a hard fail; lint cannot signal cleanliness via exit code.

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: all 9 UAT_STEPS (agents_dispatched .. gate_passed) marked complete in order

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh emits 'integer expression expected' shell errors (U-K confirmation); also emits multiple [WARN]s about HANDOFF.md/INCIDENT_RESPONSE.md/sbom.json/SECURITY.md/pen-test, but exits 0 (gate doesn't strictly fail on standard track). U-K confirmed regressed/open.

framework_bugs.summary: U-K confirmation: check-phase-gate.sh integer comparison failures on null values
framework_bugs.expected: integer comparisons handle null values without shell errors
framework_bugs.actual: lines 315 and 321 emit '[: 0\n0: integer expression expected' due to multiline/blank value being passed to test -ge / -lt

framework_bugs.summary: lint-uat-scenarios.sh exits 0 even on 'No scenarios block found'
framework_bugs.expected: non-zero exit when input lacks expected scenarios block
framework_bugs.actual: exits 0 with stderr message; callers cannot detect lint failure via $?

documentation_gaps.gap: lint-uat-scenarios.sh expectations (must be HTML with `const scenarios = [...]` JS literal) not documented.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh (no usage doc); docs/reference/builders-guide.md UAT section

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: all 6 PHASE4_STEPS (production_build, rollback_tested, go_live_verified, monitoring_configured, handoff_written, handoff_tested) complete with stub artifacts

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: complete-step phase4_release:handoff_written failed without HANDOFF.md, then succeeded after creating it

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: complete-step phase4_release:go_live_verified required RELEASE_NOTES.md (created; step then succeeded)

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: .current_phase=4 (manually advanced to allow phase4 entry, since U-D blocks auto-advance); all phase4_release steps in steps_completed

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: Matches in framework eval-prompts/scripts are documentation references (not credentials); no real secrets committed in project files

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/; framework HEAD unchanged at d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494

summary: Base/personal/desktop/standard/rust ran end-to-end: init non-interactive succeeded; PR #17 (pending-approval, lint-uat copied; BL-006 grace; BL-015 sentinel) and PR #18 (framework-self guard exits 1) verified. Confirmed three still-open prior bugs at Medium/Low (U-C BL-006 shell bypass, U-D no auto phase advance, U-K check-phase-gate integer cmp errors); also surfaced two Low/doc issues with pending-approval --validate exit code and lint-uat-scenarios usage. No new Critical/High regressions.
